---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect so we can fix it
title: 'bug: '
labels: bug
---

## Summary

Describe the bug in one or two sentences. What broke and where?

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual behavior

What actually happened? Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Severity

- [ ] Critical — data loss, security issue, or platform completely unusable
- [ ] High — major feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] Medium — feature degraded, workaround exists
- [ ] Low — cosmetic or minor inconvenience

## Environment

- LeetRank commit / version:
- OS:
- Browser and version (if frontend bug):
- Node.js version (if backend / local dev bug):
- Go version (if judge bug):

## Logs / screenshots

Paste relevant logs or attach screenshots. Sanitize any secrets before posting.

## Additional context

Related issues, network captures, reproduction rate, etc.
